posts.description:
There is something deeply satisfying about finishing a dental treatment plan and finally seeing the complete results in the mirror. At Park Smiles NYC in Carnegie Hill on the Upper East Side of Manhattan that moment is exactly what drives our team every single day.
Whether it is the relief of finally fixing a chipped tooth, the confidence boost from a teeth whitening session, or the life changing transformation of a full smile makeover our patients across Carnegie Hill, the Upper East Side, and greater Manhattan consistently tell us the same thing. They wish they had come to Park Smiles NYC sooner.
Our team takes the time most dental offices do not. We listen carefully, explain clearly, and treat every single patient like they are the most important person in the room, because to us they are.
If you have been putting off the dental care you have been wanting, today is a great day to stop waiting. Book your appointment at Park Smiles NYC and let our Carnegie Hill team show you what truly personalized dental care feels like.

Confidence starts with a smile you are proud of and at Park Smiles NYC in Carnegie Hill on the Upper East Side of Manhattan we have helped thousands of patients across greater Manhattan transform not just their teeth but their entire outlook on life.
Our patients come to us from all walks of life. Busy professionals looking for discreet Invisalign treatment. Parents searching for a gentle and trusted pediatric dentist for their children. Adults finally ready to address years of dental anxiety with our sedation dentistry options. Families who simply want one reliable dental home that handles everything with excellence and care.
Whatever brings you through our doors at Park Smiles NYC our Carnegie Hill team of specialists is ready to meet you exactly where you are, listen to your concerns, understand your goals, and deliver a completely personalized dental experience that exceeds every expectation.
Come and see why patients across Carnegie Hill, the Upper East Side, and greater Manhattan call Park Smiles NYC their dental home.
Book your appointment today and take the first step toward a healthier, more confident, and more beautiful smile.

Your smile is one of the first things people notice about you and at Park Smiles NYC in Carnegie Hill on the Upper East Side of Manhattan we make sure it always leaves a lasting impression.
Whether you need a routine cleaning, a complete smile makeover, dental implants, Invisalign, or emergency dental care our experienced team of specialists at our Carnegie Hill office handles every aspect of your dental health under one roof with the warmth, precision, and world class care that our Manhattan patients have come to love and depend on.
Park Smiles NYC serves patients across Carnegie Hill, the Upper East Side, and greater Manhattan who refuse to settle for anything less than the very best for their smile and their health. Our multilingual team speaks English, Spanish, Portuguese, Korean, Ukrainian, and Russian ensuring every patient feels completely understood and genuinely welcomed from the very first visit.
Your smile deserves the best. Book your appointment at Park Smiles NYC today and discover why Carnegie Hill families trust us as their dental home for life.

Ever wonder what goes on behind the scenes at Park Smiles NYC? Our dedicated team at our Carnegie Hill office on the Upper East Side of Manhattan works tirelessly every single day to make sure every patient receives the highest level of care in a clean, safe, and perfectly prepared environment.
From the moment our doors open to the moment they close our Carnegie Hill team is focused on one thing only, making sure your experience at Park Smiles NYC is comfortable, seamless, and truly exceptional every single time you visit.
Park Smiles NYC proudly serves patients across Carnegie Hill, the Upper East Side, and greater Manhattan with a full range of dental services including cosmetic dentistry, dental implants, Invisalign, pediatric care, and emergency dental services.
This is the team behind your smile. Book your next appointment at Park Smiles NYC today and experience the dedication and care that sets us apart.

Park Smiles NYC is a trusted provider of dentures and removable dental prosthetics located in Carnegie Hill on the Upper East Side of Manhattan, offering custom fitted and natural looking denture solutions to patients across greater Manhattan who are looking to restore their smile, their confidence, and their quality of life.
At Park Smiles NYC our experienced restorative dental team understands that losing teeth can have a profound impact on your ability to eat, speak, and smile with confidence. Our Carnegie Hill specialists design fully custom dentures that are precisely fitted to your mouth, naturally matched to your facial features, and crafted from premium materials that deliver outstanding comfort, function, and aesthetics.
Park Smiles NYC serves patients across Carnegie Hill, the Upper East Side, and greater Manhattan who need full dentures, partial dentures, or implant supported dentures. Our restorative team evaluates your specific needs and recommends the most appropriate and effective solution to restore your smile completely.
At Park Smiles NYC every patient deserves a smile that feels natural, looks beautiful, and functions perfectly every single day.
Book your denture consultation at Park Smiles NYC today and take the first step toward a complete and confident smile.

Park Smiles NYC is a trusted provider of wisdom tooth removal located in Carnegie Hill on the Upper East Side of Manhattan, offering safe, gentle, and expertly performed wisdom tooth extractions to patients across greater Manhattan who are experiencing pain, crowding, or complications from their wisdom teeth.
At Park Smiles NYC our experienced oral surgeons understand that wisdom tooth problems can develop quickly and become extremely painful and damaging if left untreated. Our Carnegie Hill specialists use advanced digital imaging to evaluate the position of your wisdom teeth, assess the level of impaction, and create a fully personalized extraction plan that ensures the safest and most comfortable procedure possible.
Park Smiles NYC serves patients across Carnegie Hill, the Upper East Side, and greater Manhattan who are experiencing wisdom tooth pain, swelling, infection, or crowding. Our oral surgery team performs both simple and complex wisdom tooth extractions with exceptional precision and a gentle approach that minimizes discomfort and speeds up recovery.
Book your wisdom tooth consultation at Park Smiles NYC today and let our Carnegie Hill oral surgery team take care of you quickly, safely, and comfortably.

Park Smiles NYC is a trusted provider of family dental care located in Carnegie Hill on the Upper East Side of Manhattan, offering comprehensive and personalized dental treatments for every member of your family under one roof across greater Manhattan.
At Park Smiles NYC our experienced team of dental specialists understands that every member of your family has unique dental needs at every stage of life. From your child's very first dental visit and teenage orthodontic care to adult cosmetic treatments and senior dental health our Carnegie Hill family dental team is equipped and experienced to care for every smile in your household with the same exceptional level of attention, skill, and compassion.
Park Smiles NYC serves families across Carnegie Hill, the Upper East Side, and greater Manhattan who are looking for one trusted dental home where every family member feels genuinely welcomed, comfortable, and completely well cared for at every visit. Our warm and child friendly Carnegie Hill office makes dental visits something the whole family can feel good about.
At Park Smiles NYC we believe that a healthy family starts with healthy smiles and our Carnegie Hill team is committed to being the dental home your family trusts for life.
Book your family dental appointment at Park Smiles NYC today and give every member of your family the gift of a healthy and confident smile.

Park Smiles NYC is a trusted provider of dental care for seniors located in Carnegie Hill on the Upper East Side of Manhattan, offering gentle, comprehensive, and fully personalized dental treatments to older adults across greater Manhattan who deserve the highest level of care and attention at every stage of life.
At Park Smiles NYC our experienced dental team understands that the dental needs of older adults are unique and require a specialist level of knowledge, patience, and sensitivity. From managing dry mouth and medication related dental side effects to treating gum recession, worn teeth, and replacing missing teeth with implants or dentures our Carnegie Hill team provides complete senior dental care under one roof with the warmth and compassion every patient deserves.
Park Smiles NYC serves senior patients across Carnegie Hill, the Upper East Side, and greater Manhattan who are looking for a trusted and experienced dental team that truly understands their needs and takes the time to listen, explain, and deliver care that makes a real difference in their quality of life.
At Park Smiles NYC every patient regardless of age deserves a healthy, comfortable, and confident smile.
Book your senior dental care appointment at Park Smiles NYC today and experience the compassionate and expert care your smile deserves.

Park Smiles NYC is a trusted provider of professional teeth whitening located in Carnegie Hill on the Upper East Side of Manhattan, offering safe, fast, and dramatically effective whitening treatments to patients across greater Manhattan who want a brighter and more confident smile.
At Park Smiles NYC our experienced cosmetic dental team offers both in office and take home professional whitening options that are customized specifically for your smile. Our in office whitening treatment delivers stunning results in a single appointment while our custom take home whitening kits allow you to brighten your smile on your own schedule with professional grade results that no store bought product can match.
Park Smiles NYC serves patients across Carnegie Hill, the Upper East Side, and greater Manhattan who are looking to remove years of staining caused by coffee, tea, wine, and everyday wear. Our cosmetic specialists evaluate your current shade, understand your whitening goals, and recommend the most effective treatment to deliver the brightest and most natural looking result possible.
At Park Smiles NYC we believe every patient deserves to smile with complete confidence every single day.
Book your professional teeth whitening appointment at Park Smiles NYC today and discover just how bright your smile can truly be.

How often do you think about the connection between your diet and your dental health? What you eat every single day has a direct and powerful impact on the strength of your teeth, the health of your gums, and the brightness of your smile.
At Park Smiles NYC our experienced dental team in Carnegie Hill on the Upper East Side of Manhattan educates every patient on the foods and habits that protect their smile and the ones that silently cause damage over time. From the hidden sugars in everyday foods to the acidic drinks that quietly erode your enamel, our Carnegie Hill specialists give every patient the personalized nutritional guidance they need to make smarter choices for their long term dental health.
Park Smiles NYC serves patients across Carnegie Hill, the Upper East Side, and greater Manhattan who want to take a truly proactive approach to maintaining a strong, healthy, and beautiful smile between dental visits.
A healthy smile starts with what is on your plate. Book your comprehensive dental health appointment at Park Smiles NYC today and let our Carnegie Hill team help you build habits that protect your smile for life.

summary.snippet: "Wonderful experience overall, lovely staff and very kind doctors!"
"Great service, nice people, and now i have the cleanest teeth!"
"Such a horrible way to run an office and run customer service."

most_relevant.description:
Dr. Kaplan has been Bruno's dentist since he was a baby, and now, at 11 years old, he still looks forward to seeing her. That alone speaks volumes about the incredible care she provides. Dr. Kaplan is kind, attentive, patient, knowledgeable, and genuinely cares about her patients. She always takes the time to explain everything clearly and makes both children and parents feel comfortable and confident. Over the years, she has consistently provided outstanding care, and we are truly grateful to have her as Bruno's dentist.
Unfortunately, our experience with the front desk staff has been the complete opposite. They are often unwelcoming, unhelpful, and come across as rude and dismissive. Simple interactions can feel unpleasant due to their attitude and lack of professionalism. It is disappointing because the level of customer service at the front desk does not reflect the exceptional quality of care provided by Dr. Kaplan.
To be completely honest, the only reason we have remained with this practice for so many years is Dr. Kaplan. She is an extraordinary dentist and an even more extraordinary person. Her dedication, compassion, and professionalism are the reason families like ours continue to return year after year.

Had my first cleaning with Gus this morning and had such a great experience! He was so personable, communicative about the process, and made me feel comfortable during the appointment. He made sure there was space to ask questions and that I understood his responses. He took great care of me and I had one of the best experiences that I’ve ever had at the dentist. 10/10 highly recommend

Dr. Kendall is wonderful.  The entire staff was not only kind to me and attentive, checking on my comfort level repeatedly, they were visibly kind to each other.  I felt comfortable throughout the entire process.  I was given a detailed estimate of the work I wanted done, Dr. Kendall listened to what I wanted, provided feedback on what would be possible and she executed it so well.  I am happy with my dental work and look forward to coming back on my 2 week follow-up.  Thank you Park Smiles team!

It's been about a year since my last dental cleaning and didn't like that experience, so I wanted to try a new office - naturally I was nervous with experiencing a new hygienist. To my surprise, I was introduced and handled perfectly by Gus, the dental hygienist. He was incredible! Patient, delicate, meticulous, and hugely experienced in his field. The entire experience from entering into the office, to working with Gus, sharing a few laughs, to exiting was shockingly a delight.

Dr. Shari is an incredibly professional and amazing dentist — very careful, meticulous, and detail-oriented. Gustavo was wonderful as amazing. This was my first teeth cleaning, so I didn’t know what to expect, but it turned out to be a great experience. I’m already looking forward to my next cleaning — and it will definitely be with Gustavo.

Had our first experience at park smiles pediatric, was able to call and get a same day emergency appointment. Staff was very helpful and quick.
Dr. Kaplan was amazing! She was so sweet and patient talking to our child about the whole process and throughout of what was going to happen  and what she was doing making our child so calm and relaxed. It was an amazing experience.

If you need a dentist, make an appointment at Park Smiles NYC right away. During my initial visit, Gus, the hygienist, did an absolutely amazing job of helping me feel comfortable with the services and then cleaned my teeth painlessly. He pointed out a few problem areas, which Dr. Ginsberg later confirmed needed attention. It was a terrific experience from start to finish. I left the office feeling confident that I was in excellent hands. I highly recommend the team at Park Smiles NYC!

I had step 1 of dental implant surgery today at Park Ave Smiles and I was very nervous about the surgery, having heard some not-so-great experiences from people I know. Dr. Justin (oral surgeon) and his assistant Sonam were fantastic! They handled me with incredible patience, kindness and explained everything they were doing thoroughly. I especially appreciated Dr. Justin’s sense of humor, helping to make a tense situation much lighter. I highly recommend them!

local_results.title: Park Avenue Oral & Facial Surgery, P.C.
